name: Verifies that if multi-select decisions are not set in RudderStack, all fields are treated as normal fields (no multi-select array transformation).
fullName: test/integrations/component.test.ts#/home/runner/work/rudder-transformer/rudder-transformer/test/integrations/destinations/zoho/router/data.ts Tests zoho destination router -> Verifies that if multi-select decisions are not set in RudderStack, all fields are treated as normal fields (no multi-select array transformation). $descriptionSuffix (index: 4)
description:
Feature: router
      Description: Verifies that if multi-select decisions are not set in RudderStack, all fields are treated as normal fields (no multi-select array transformation).
      Success Criteria: Record is successfully upserted with a 200 response, treating all fields as normal fields.
      Scenario: Insert action for Zoho Leads where multi-select config is absent, ensuring no appended multi-select behavior.
      Test ID: router-1738307215531
      API Version: v0
